# The Box House Hotel

> Boutique loft-style hotel at 77 Box Street, Greenpoint, Brooklyn, NY 11222, with a retractable-roof rooftop event venue operated by Box House Events. Phone 718.383.3800 (hotel) · 718.395.6450 (events). Best rates when booking direct at https://secure.webrez.com/hotel/1091/.

The Box House Hotel offers suite, apartment, and penthouse-style accommodations, most with full kitchens and private terraces, plus on-site dining at The Brooklyn Lantern and a rooftop with Manhattan skyline views. Box House Events hosts weddings, corporate events, and private celebrations with all-inclusive in-house planning, Michelin-recognized catering by MADRE (214 Franklin St), and A/V production by Room 11 Productions. The hotel is part of the same Brooklyn family as Henry Norman Hotel, Franklin Guesthouse, and Habitat 101.

## Hotel

- [Accommodations](https://theboxhousehotel.com/rooms/): suites, apartments, and penthouses; sleeps up to six; full kitchens
- [About](https://theboxhousehotel.com/about-the-box-house/): the building, neighborhood, and story
- [Gallery](https://theboxhousehotel.com/gallery/): photography of rooms, rooftop, and event spaces
- [Dining](https://theboxhousehotel.com/dining/): The Brooklyn Lantern
- [Special Offers](https://theboxhousehotel.com/special-offers/): Brooklyn Romance, Loyalty Promotion (10% off), Weekday Special (10% off Sun–Thu), The Long Haul (15% off 5+ nights)
- [Rooftop & Events](https://theboxhousehotel.com/events/): retractable rooftop venue
- [Contact](https://theboxhousehotel.com/contact/): general inquiries form, directions, map
- [FAQ](https://theboxhousehotel.com/faq/): policies, parking, pets, check-in

## Events (Box House Events)

- [Events at the Box House](https://theboxhousehotel.com/box-house-events/): 10,000 sq ft, up to 400 guests, retractable roof
- [Weddings](https://theboxhousehotel.com/weddings/): all-inclusive weddings above the skyline
- [Corporate Events](https://theboxhousehotel.com/corporate-events/): meetings, launches, fundraisers
- [Private Events](https://theboxhousehotel.com/private-events/): birthdays, showers, holiday parties
- [MADRE Catering](https://theboxhousehotel.com/madre-catering/): Michelin-recognized sister restaurant and caterer
- [Room 11 Productions](https://theboxhousehotel.com/room-11-productions/): in-house A/V team (bands, DJs, lighting)
- [Meet the Team](https://theboxhousehotel.com/our-team/): event planning and sales team
- Event inquiries: hostyourevent@theboxhousehotel.com · 718.395.6450

## Journal

- [The Box House Journal](https://theboxhousehotel.com/blog/): wedding and event planning guides and inspiration

## Optional

- [Press](https://theboxhousehotel.com/press/): NYT, Barron's, US News coverage
